label: gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview
descriptiveGuide: This 35-minute full-body session covers compound movements: 3 sets of squats, bench press, and bent-over rows. Start with a weight you can lift for 8-10 reps with good form. Rest 90 seconds between sets and focus on controlled movement.
imagePrompt: Instructional illustration of a flat bench press setup and bottom position: feet planted, slight arch in lower back, shoulder blades retracted, bar path vertically over mid-chest. Include arrows showing wrist stacked over elbows and controlled bar path. Minimal background, clean lines, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.
